visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a beige mock-neck top and a delicate gold necklace, sits indoors against a neutral wall. She gestures towards the camera and a large white plastic takeout container positioned in front of her. Her facial expression is lively with bright eyes and a smiling mouth. (2) She reaches down and carefully removes the white plastic lid from the container. Inside, a deep red, saucy stew is revealed, steaming slightly. Pieces of chicken and green scallions are visible within the vibrant red broth. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the textures of the food. (3) Using wooden chopsticks, she pulls a long cluster of translucent glass noodles from the stew, showing them close to the lens. She then picks up a cylindrical rice cake and a piece of chicken, bringing each to her mouth and eating them with an expression of intense enjoyment. (4) She holds up a small rectangular carton of peach-flavored drink. After showing the brand name, she takes a long sip from the straw, looking refreshed. The scene remains consistent in her indoor setting, likely a home or studio environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國人最近都不吃辣炒年糕了. (2) [Subtitle]: 你們一定會吃什麼？辣炒年糕嗎？ (3) [Subtitle]: 例如：엽기떡볶이 獵奇辣炒年糕. (4) [Subtitle]: 但是呢. (5) [Subtitle]: 其實韓國在地人現在都會點另外一種餐點，就是. (6) [Subtitle]: 開箱！(7) [Subtitle]: 獵奇辣燉雞湯 엽닭. (8) [Subtitle]: 已經有年糕. (9) [Subtitle]: 記得加「冬粉」喔！(10) [Subtitle]: 只點一道菜，卻能同時吃到辣燉雞鍋和辣炒年糕. (11) [Subtitle]: 這是韓國人偷偷吃的隱藏菜單. (12) [Subtitle]: 「獵奇엽떡」明明是賣辣炒年糕的店. (13) [Subtitle]: 雞肉居然這麼好吃？(14) [Subtitle]: 沒錯，真的超讚. (15) [Subtitle]: 冬粉 = 靈魂. (16) [Subtitle]: 韓式辣燉雞一定要加冬粉才對味. (17) [Subtitle]: 馬鈴薯！(18) [Subtitle]: 馬鈴薯，年糕，雞肉=基本提供. (19) [Subtitle]: 大家也在韓國點「獵奇」的時候可以點看看這個餐點！！

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long dark hair, wearing a beige mock-neck top and a gold necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor room, possibly a bedroom or studio, with a wooden shelving unit visible behind the subject.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female speaker initiates the track with a bright, high-energy vocal tone and a fast speech rate in Mandarin. She is accompanied by an upbeat electronic pop track featuring a steady 120 BPM tempo, synthetic percussive beats, and a cheerful major mode. (2) Distinct sounds of plastic rustling and a muffled mechanical pop occur as she opens the takeout lid. Her vocal delivery maintains high arousal and positive valence, with frequent rising pitch contours used for emphasis. The ambient floor is a clean studio silence. (3) Short, stylized 'whoosh' and 'pop' sound effects are interspersed to accentuate visual transitions. The speaker's voice exhibits high articulation clarity as she describes the ingredients. The BGM persists with consistent intensity and no structural pauses. (4) A subtle liquid splashing and suction sound is heard as she sips a beverage. The speaker's intensity swells when she recommends the 'soulful' glass noodles, followed by a warm, casual closing tone. The music-to-speech ratio stays balanced throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video introduces a 'hidden' popular menu item from a famous Korean restaurant chain, specifically spicy braised chicken with rice cakes and glass noodles. The creator aims to share a local dining trend and influence viewers to try this dish instead of the standard spicy rice cakes by demonstrating its rich ingredients and appealing taste.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Mention of a specific food brand chain and showing a specific beverage brand commonly associated with it.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy food unboxing and review typical of social media trends, featuring fast cuts and dense text overlays to maintain viewer engagement.
